name: Hurt by coworker negligence at work in Boise, can I sue them personally?

mainEntity.name: Hurt by coworker negligence at work in Boise, can I sue them personally?

acceptedAnswer.description: Generally no, co-employee immunity under Idaho workers' comp unless intentional assault. Sue third parties only.[2] Key factors: gross negligence rare exception, comp exclusive. Focus employer benefits, external liability; rare coworker suits. Comp simplifies.
